assertions.text: Creates me.md, vision.md, design.md, workingstyle.md at the project root (not in .claude/ or docs/)
Runs the per-file grilling interview (3-4 questions each, one at a time) rather than 14 questions at once
Annotates any seeded content with '> Imported from <source>' and surfaces sync suggestions without auto-executing

cases.prompt: Refresh just my vision.md, the project direction changed.

assertions.text: Runs single-file mode for vision.md only and skips the other three files
Asks the vision.md questions (one-liner, first target user, 3-month success metric, out-of-scope)
